data.title: SPOZZ, a community-owned music platform, introduces "BEATS" for direct creator-to-creator music licensing and sales.
data.description: Today in Miami, SPOZZ, a rapidly expanding community-operated music and streaming platform, revealed the launch of BEATS, an innovative feature enabling artists to sell and license their original music directly to fellow creators through a new standardized system. This move marks a significant development for the platform, which has been gaining traction recently.

data.title: Florida Southern College appoints Dr. Martha Placeres as the Wilhelmina MacDonald Endowed Chair in Music.
data.description: In Lakeland, Florida on October 2, 2025, Florida Southern College shared news that Dr. Martha Placeres will be taking on the role of the Wilhelmina MacDonald Endowed Faculty Chair in Music. Dr. Placeres, who has been with the college since 2019, will now be leading in this prestigious position.

data.title: Money market fund assets hit record high of $7.37 trillion, with $50.55 billion increase in a week - ICI report.
data.description: On October 1, 2025, the Investment Company Institute disclosed that the total assets of money market funds surged by $50.55 billion to reach $7.37 trillion. Government funds within taxable money market funds witnessed a notable growth of $54.64 billion during the same period.

data.title: Compass Diversified declares Q3 2025 distributions on Series A, B, and C preferred shares. Board approves quarterly cash distribution.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, Compass Diversified (NYSE: CODI), a company possessing prominent middle market businesses, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash distribution for all three of its preferred share series.

data.title: Sunrise secures $29M contract for 10,000 tons of artificial graphite anode materials with China Sodium Times.
data.description: Sunrise New Energy Co., Ltd. (NASDAQ: EPOW) based in Dover, USA, revealed that its subsidiary, Sunrise (Guizhou) New Energy Materials Co., Ltd., has signed a notable one-year supply agreement with China Sodium Times (Shenzhen) New Energy Technology Co., Ltd., a prominent lithium battery pack manufacturer. This contract marks a significant partnership between the two companies and underscores Sunrise's commitment to the new energy sector. The deal is poised to enhance production and distribution, with both companies poised to benefit from this collaboration.

data.title: Hasbro will announce its third quarter 2025 earnings on October 23, 2025. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET. Stock Symbol: $HAS.
data.description: Hasbro, Inc. revealed that they will disclose their third quarter financial results on Thursday, October 23, 2025, prior to the market opening. The company, trading as NASDAQ: HAS, will be hosting a webcast of their earnings conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Specific financial and statistical details, including information mandated by Regulation G, will be accessible on Hasbro's Investor Relations website during the webcast.
Johnson meets Trump - reports

data.title: Rumble and Perplexity form a strategic partnership, joining forces to enhance operations.
data.description: According to recent reports, the economy is projected to grow by an estimated 4% in the next fiscal year. Unemployment rates have risen to 6.5%, with approximately 1.8 million people currently out of work. Inflation also saw an increase, reaching 2.3% in the last quarter. The government is planning to invest $500 million in infrastructure projects to stimulate economic growth. Additionally, the stock market experienced a 10% decrease this week, causing concern among investors. Experts are advising caution in the current financial market.

data.title: TEN Ltd. declares $0.59375 quarterly dividend for Series F Preferred Shares. Board of Directors announcement.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, a prominent crude, product, and LNG tanker operator, TEN Ltd. (“TEN”), based in Athens, Greece, revealed that its Board of Directors has sanctioned the usual quarterly cash dividend of about $0.59375 per share for its Series F Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares, traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TENPRF.

data.title: PDF Solutions partners with Lavorro for Generative AI to speed up semiconductor fab documentation access.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California on October 2, 2025, PDF Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: PDFS), a prominent data solutions provider for the semiconductor and electronics industries, disclosed a collaboration with Lavorro Inc., a frontrunner in Generative AI for semiconductor manufacturing. This partnership aims to grant shared customers the ability to retrieve up-to-date engineering documentation from the semiconductor fab they oversee. The end goal is to facilitate swifter and more efficient execution of tasks and control of manufacturing equipment.

data.title: T-Mobile to redeem Sprint's $1.5B 7.625% Notes due 2025 on November 1 at 100% of principal + accrued interest.
data.description: T-Mobile US, Inc. revealed that its subsidiary Sprint LLC will be redeeming the complete $1.5 billion outstanding principal of its 7.625% Notes by November 1, 2025. The Notes, due on March 1, 2026, with CUSIP No. 85207U AK1, will be reimbursed at a redemption rate of 100% of the principal amount, along with accrued and unpaid interest until the redemption date. The repayment will include interest up to but not encompassing the redemption day.
Boeing Announces 777X Delay to 2027, Potentially Costing Billions

data.title: Immersion Corp (Nasdaq: IMMR) receives delinquency notice from Nasdaq for missing filing deadline of Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q.
data.description: In AVENTURA, Florida, Immersion Corporation (Nasdaq: IMMR), a top haptic technology provider, disclosed on September 29, 2025, that it received a delinquency compliance alert notice (referred to as the “10-Q Nasdaq Notification Letter”) from Nasdaq. The notice highlighted that the Company failed to submit its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the fiscal quarter concluding in July of that year.

data.title: CoStar Group will report Q3 financial results on October 28, 2025. Management to host conference call at 5:00 PM EDT.
data.description: Arlington, Virginia - CoStar Group, Inc., a prominent provider of online real estate platforms and technology (NASDAQ: CSGP), is set to release its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025 after the market closes on Tuesday, October 28, 2025. Following the announcement, company management will host a conference call at 5:00 PM EDT on the same day to review the quarterly results and discuss the future outlook. A live audio webcast of the conference call will be available for stakeholders.

data.title: Wintrust Financial appoints 2 new board members - Laura Kohl, Morningstar CIO, and David Richter, GCM Grosvenor MD.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, Wintrust Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: WTFC) revealed the addition of Laura Kohl, Morningstar, Inc.'s Chief Information Officer, and David Richter, Managing Director at GCM Grosvenor, to its Board of Directors. The appointments were made effective starting October 1, 2025, strengthening the board with key industry professionals.

data.title: Garmin hits all-time high with stock strength rating upgraded to 83, showing rising market leadership.
data.description: Garmin's stock has seen a significant increase in price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 80 to 83. The company has identified a lucrative market segment for growth, resulting in its stock hitting an all-time high. With this positive momentum, Garmin is demonstrating strong market leadership and has earned a Stock Strength Rating of 83.

data.title: Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) to release Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 29; conference call on Oct 30, at 9:00 a.m. (PT). Dial-in: (877) 407-9039. Webcast available. Replay dial-in: (844) 512-2921.
data.description: Glendale-based Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) plans to unveil its Q3 2025 earnings post-market on Wednesday, October 29. This will be followed by a conference call on October 30 at 9:00 a.m. (PT) to delve into these results. For the live call, use the Domestic dial-in at (877) 407-9039, and the International dial-in at (201) 689-8470, or watch the webcast on the Event Calendar. A replay of the call will be available via the Domestic dial-in at (844) 512-2921.

data.title: Cidara Therapeutics awarded $339M from BARDA for CD388 flu preventative therapeutic development.
data.description: On October 02, 2025, Cidara Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: CDTX), a biotech firm leveraging its Cloudbreak® technology to create drug-Fc conjugate (DFC) therapeutics, revealed it secured an award worth potentially $339 million from the Biomedical Advanced Research and Development Authority (BARDA). The award stems from the Administration for Strategic Preparedness and Response (ASPR) within the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS).

data.title: Corvus Pharma appoints David Moore to Board.Exec VP at Novo Nordisk with 27 years experience joining.#biopharma #boardofdirectors
data.description: South San Francisco, California - On October 2, 2025, Corvus Pharmaceuticals, Inc. revealed that David Moore, the Executive Vice President of US Operations at Novo Nordisk A/S and President of Novo Nordisk Inc., will be joining their Board of Directors. With an impressive 27-year tenure in the sector, Mr. Moore’s background spans various key areas such as strategy, commercial operations, market access, business development, and investments. This encompasses his involvement in large-cap pharmaceutical firms, biotechnology companies, and private equity ventures. Corvus Pharmaceuticals, Inc., listed under NASDAQ as CRVS, is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical entity.

data.title: CACI awarded $73M contract to modernize U.S. Air Force's Integrated Broadcast Service for DOD, supporting national security.
data.description: CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) from Reston, Virginia, has secured a new five-year contract exceeding $73 million. The contract aims to enhance the Department of the Air Force's network infrastructure for transmitting crucial intelligence and targeting information swiftly across various domains like air, ground, and space. This initiative supports the Department of Defense (DOD) and allied forces by ensuring efficient communication of time-sensitive data. The modernization efforts are essential for improving operational effectiveness and readiness at the tactical level, enabling timely decision-making for warfighters in the field.
